title: Acoustofluidic filtration for forensic cell enrichment
titleZh: 用於法醫細胞富集的聲流體過濾
story: Bubble-driven acoustic streaming clears filter fouling while cross-flow filtration enriches target cells from complex, highly imbalanced samples.
storyZh: 氣泡聲流在微尺度中清除濾孔阻塞，並結合錯流過濾，從複雜且比例懸殊的樣品中富集目標細胞。
outcome: A Lab on a Chip cover-featured example of useful physics, device design, and downstream STR analysis working together.
outcomeZh: 獲選 Lab on a Chip 封面特色，展現物理機制、晶片設計與後續 STR 分析如何共同成立。

title: AI-assisted real-time hemodialysis monitoring
titleZh: AI 輔助即時血液透析監測
story: A multi-wavelength optical system measures spent dialysate every minute and combines the signal with patient-specific variables to estimate toxin clearance during treatment.
storyZh: 多波長光學系統每分鐘量測透析廢液，並結合病人特徵，嘗試在療程進行中估測尿毒素清除。
outcome: A research direction with clear clinical usefulness: turning continuous signals into patient-aware decision support.
outcomeZh: 具明確臨床有用度的研究方向：把連續訊號轉化為具個人化脈絡的決策支援。

title: Wearable devices for biomedical, rehabilitation, and sports applications
titleZh: 用於生醫、復健與運動科學的穿戴型裝置
story: Flexible pressure and physiological sensors are developed for signals that matter in daily movement: pulse, posture, joint loading, recovery, and animal-health monitoring.
storyZh: 柔性壓力與生理感測器用來追蹤日常動作中真正有用的訊號：脈搏、姿態、關節負荷、恢復情形與動物健康監測。
outcome: A route for mechatronics to contribute to biomedical engineering, rehabilitation, sports science, breeding, and animal medicine.
outcomeZh: 讓機電工程進入生物醫學、復健、運動科學、育種與動物醫學的應用路徑。

title: Digital microfluidics for gene/disease diagnostics
titleZh: 數位微流體基因／疾病診斷平台
story: Digital microfluidics uses programmed electrodes to move, mix, split, and meter tiny droplets for molecular sample preparation and assay workflows with fewer manual steps.
storyZh: 數位微流體以可程式化電極移動、混合、分裂與定量微小液滴，支援分子樣品前處理與檢測流程，減少人工步驟。
outcome: A strong student-learning platform because physics, electronics, assay design, and automation meet in one device.
outcomeZh: 很適合作為學生訓練平台，因為物理、電子、檢測設計與自動化在同一個裝置中相遇。
